## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Host integration (Claude / Codex / Kiro / Cursor)

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Docs / README updated if commands or behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal paths in the diff
- [ ] The change is scoped to one thing (split unrelated changes into separate PRs)
